name: Kai
oneliner: Kai is the first agentic AI cybersecurity platform, using autonomous AI agents to detect, reason about, and respond to threats at machine speed across both IT and OT environments.
finserv: Fortune 500 customers already signed; seven-figure bookings in first 10 months; financial services infrastructure explicitly among target verticals; founders built Claroty and SecurityMatters with deep industrial and financial sector traction
team: Founded by creators of Claroty (acquired ~$1.5B by Rockwell Automation) and SecurityMatters. Backed by Evolution Equity Partners (lead), N47, and strategic co-investors. $125M raised on stealth exit.
thesis: As you build the regulated infrastructure layer for agentic AI in financial services, security of agent-to-agent communication becomes a mandatory component. Kai represents a potential integration partner — its agentic threat detection sits directly in the path of any compliance-grade deployment. This also signals that agentic cybersecurity is maturing into a standalone category worth monitoring for partnership or due-diligence purposes.
